api.missingKey: Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY in a .env file at the project root (Google Cloud credentials → API key, with Speech-to-Text, Translation, and Text-to-Speech enabled).
api.newsMissingKey: Set VITE_NEWSAPI_KEY in a .env file at the project root (NewsAPI developer key).

toolbar.title: Live voice translation
toolbar.subtitle: Press Space or use the mic below to start / stop

swap.titleAuto: Cannot swap while source is auto-detect
swap.titleBidirectional: Swap languages A / B (primary / alternate STT)
swap.ariaBidirectional: Swap two-way languages A and B

pairSelect.aTitle: Primary speech language (biases recognition; can swap with B)

bubble.placeholderSource: Original text appears here. Tap the mic or press Space to speak.
bubble.placeholderTranslation: Translation appears in this bubble and is read aloud when ready.

viz.hint: Recording… press again or press Space to stop

hints.noAudioBlob: No audio captured. Please try again.
hints.emptyRecognize: Nothing recognized. Move closer to the mic or speak louder.
hints.bidirectionalUnknown: Could not match either selected language. Try again or swap A / B (primary / alternate STT).
hints.micDenied: Microphone access denied. Check browser permissions.

quickTest.metaBidirectionalLead: Uses language B of the current pair ({{label}});
quickTest.metaEnv: requires .env at the project root with VITE_GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY

controls.recordingStop: Tap again or press Space to stop recording
controls.idleCredentials: Space or tap the mic to start. Credentials use an API key; see .env.example

vocabularyPage.title: Vocabulary
vocabularyPage.body: Flashcards, spaced repetition, and API integration will arrive in a later release. This page is a placeholder.

speakingPage.title: Speaking practice
speakingPage.body: Future recording, speech recognition, and pronunciation hints will reuse this app’s voice pipeline. This page is a placeholder.

newsPage.title: Tech news
newsPage.subtitle: Recent English technology headlines (NewsAPI). Each card shows the title and date. Use Play to hear the NewsAPI summary with the browser voice, or open the article link for the full story.
newsPage.ttsUnsupported: Speech synthesis is not supported in this browser.
